svg.title: Hathaway Chapter 2: Unit sphere construction for rotations, turns, and arc steps
svg.desc: A unit sphere centered at fixed point O, showing radii OA and OB, the rotation axis OP, great circle arc AB, and the bisecting great circle perpendicular to AB at its midpoint.
svg.text: Arc AB — the turn (angle of rotation on sphere surface)
OP — unique rotation axis (intersection of bisecting great circles)
Bisecting great circle — perpendicular to arc AB at its midpoint M
